title: Data Management in R
text: Index to my data management notes in Quarto.

title: 2  Data being used
text:
2.1.1 Load BSA teaching data

df <- read_sav('/Users/joecrowley/R/Data/BSA Teaching Data/spss/spss25/bsa2019_poverty_open.sav', user_na = T)
